testcase.name: test_premium_plans_endpoint
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration34_real_system.py:83: in test_premium_plans_endpoint assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_cashback_transactions_real_data
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration34_real_system.py:112: in test_cashback_transactions_real_data assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_conversations

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance({'conversations': [{'last_message': {'content': 'TEST_Message from iteration 27 test', 'created_at': '2026-01-24T01:04:58.633251+00:00', 'id': '5988ad0a-dde4-429f-a8ce-cd2023bff97e', 'is_read': False, ...}, 'partner': {'cashback_balance': 0, 'city': 'Lausanne', 'created_at': '2026-01-21T22:57:48.436Z', 'email': 'spa.luxury@titelli.com', ...}, 'unread_count': 0}, {'last_message': {'content': 'Test message to self', 'created_at': '2026-01-23T00:49:38.354073+00:00', 'id': 'd304662b-5c6b-4395-9052-3bf89d7c7965', 'is_read': False, ...}, 'partner': {'activity_posts_count': 2, 'bank_account_holder': 'Test User', 'cashback_balance': 100.82000000000001, 'city': 'Lausanne', ...}, 'unread_count': 1}]}, list)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration34_real_system.py:157: in test_get_conversations assert isinstance(data, list) E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = isinstance({'conversations': [{'last_message': {'content': 'TEST_Message from iteration 27 test', 'created_at': '2026-01-24T01:04:58.633251+00:00', 'id': '5988ad0a-dde4-429f-a8ce-cd2023bff97e', 'is_read': False, ...}, 'partner': {'cashback_balance': 0, 'city': 'Lausanne', 'created_at': '2026-01-21T22:57:48.436Z', 'email': 'spa.luxury@titelli.com', ...}, 'unread_count': 0}, {'last_message': {'content': 'Test message to self', 'created_at': '2026-01-23T00:49:38.354073+00:00', 'id': 'd304662b-5c6b-4395-9052-3bf89d7c7965', 'is_read': False, ...}, 'partner': {'activity_posts_count': 2, 'bank_account_holder': 'Test User', 'cashback_balance': 100.82000000000001, 'city': 'Lausanne', ...}, 'unread_count': 1}]}, list)

testcase.name: test_send_message
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration34_real_system.py:177: in test_send_message assert response.status_code in [200, 201] E assert 422 in [200, 201] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_friend_requests

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance({'received': [{'created_at': '2026-01-23T19:55:46.840221+00:00', 'friend_id': 'c99d11be-d54e-4f09-abd1-05ae34a933cb', 'id': 'e0cad5dd-7c7f-4e0d-a06f-616f481b154c', 'message': None, ...}, {'created_at': '2026-01-24T22:37:15.027889+00:00', 'friend_id': 'c99d11be-d54e-4f09-abd1-05ae34a933cb', 'id': 'e8b6a896-a791-43f3-b405-31cbfcb55a81', 'message': None, ...}], 'sent': [{'created_at': '2026-01-23T00:46:30.397203+00:00', 'friend_id': 'ea83d2dd-7cba-442d-b7ae-8d18d292be95', 'id': '77330b0d-86bf-4744-919b-51ae39cff9e0', 'message': 'Salut! Ajoutons-nous en amis!', ...}]}, list)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration34_real_system.py:206: in test_get_friend_requests assert isinstance(data, list) E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = isinstance({'received': [{'created_at': '2026-01-23T19:55:46.840221+00:00', 'friend_id': 'c99d11be-d54e-4f09-abd1-05ae34a933cb', 'id': 'e0cad5dd-7c7f-4e0d-a06f-616f481b154c', 'message': None, ...}, {'created_at': '2026-01-24T22:37:15.027889+00:00', 'friend_id': 'c99d11be-d54e-4f09-abd1-05ae34a933cb', 'id': 'e8b6a896-a791-43f3-b405-31cbfcb55a81', 'message': None, ...}], 'sent': [{'created_at': '2026-01-23T00:46:30.397203+00:00', 'friend_id': 'ea83d2dd-7cba-442d-b7ae-8d18d292be95', 'id': '77330b0d-86bf-4744-919b-51ae39cff9e0', 'message': 'Salut! testcase.name: test_admin_stats_endpoint

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'total_users' in {'recent_orders': [{'created_at': '2026-01-24T01:21:58.669506+00:00', 'delivery_address': None, 'enterprise_id': 'b34dd7dd-e7ac-4308-83c8-173163ebc819', 'id': '0938b117-ba1c-4266-95f7-1e5617b86ec5', ...}, {'created_at': '2026-01-24T01:21:54.480567+00:00', 'delivery_address': None, 'enterprise_id': '2026-01-24T22:53:36.801080+00:00', ...}, {'address': None, 'avatar': '/api/uploads/2d468faa-6846-4f73-9019-92a27b785875.png', 'cashback_balance': 0.0, 'city': 'Lausanne', ...}, {'address': None, testcase.name: test_get_notifications

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance({'notifications': [{'color': 'green', 'created_at': '2026-01-25T00:49:03.437067+00:00', 'data': {}, 'icon': 'credit-card', ...}, {'color': 'green', 'created_at': '2026-01-25T00:48:13.022969+00:00', 'data': {}, 'icon': 'credit-card', ...}, {'color': 'green', 'created_at': '2026-01-25T00:47:40.686699+00:00', 'data': {}, 'icon': 'credit-card', ...}, {'color': 'green', 'created_at': '2026-01-25T00:47:33.311307+00:00', 'data': {}, 'icon': 'credit-card', ...}, {'color': 'green', 'created_at': '2026-01-25T00:42:43.980376+00:00', 'data': {}, 'icon': 'credit-card', ...}, {'color': 'green', 'created_at': '2026-01-25T00:26:26.721386+00:00', 'data': {}, 'icon': 'credit-card', ...}, ...], 'unread_count': 6}, list)
